roa.docketEntryComment: ORDER FOR VIDEO OR TELEPHONE COURT APPEARANCE SIGNED & FILED

/CAL:PC 1171,1 PETITION HEARING/DEF:IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM FROM SOLEDAD STATEPRISON, CDCR# H03900/CTORD:THE MOTION PURSUANT TO PC 1171,1 IS GRANTED AND THE 1 YEAR SENTENCE ENHANCEMENT FOR A PRIOR CONVICTION PURSUANT TO PC 667,5(B) IS VACTED/CTORD:ALL LANGUAGE IN THE JULY 7, 2020 RE-SENTENCE ORDER REGARDING A PAROLE ELIGIBILITY DATE IS STRICKEN, CDCR SHOULD CALCULATE PAROLE ELIGIBILITY BASED ON THEIR RECORD OF CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED IN THIS IN THIS CASE AND PURSUANT TO ANY APPLICABLE STATUTES/

/CAL:TO SET DEFENSE PC 171,1 PETITION FOR RESENTENCE/X:THE DEFENDANT APPEARS IN COURT VIA ZOOM,/X:COURT SETS THE FOLLOWING BRIEFING SCHEDULE: PUBLICDEFENDER TO FILE SUPPORTIVE BRIEF BY 05-09-22;  DISTRICT ATTORNEY TO REPLYBY 05-16-22;  PD TO FILE ANY RESPONSIVE BRIEF BY 05-23-22,/CONTD:PC 1171,1 PETITION HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:DEFENSE PETITION TO RESENTENCE PUR PC1171,1/PD/DAWT/BWR:03-10-81/BWR1/CONTD:TO SET DEFENSE PETITION TO RESENTENCE PUC PC1171,1 IN DEPT, 20/DAWF/
/CAL: TO SET DEFENSE PETIT TO RESENTENCE PURS TO PC1171,1/DEF: PRESENT FROM CDCR VIA ZOOM/X: MATTER TBH BY JUDGE GIORGI/CONT/DOP/
W/CONSTL RGHT PLD G 192,1PC;CT MKE FNDG
DEFT IN SP ON COMMITMT OUT SANTA CLARA;BW NB O/C
JURY UNABLE REACH VERD;MO MISTRL GRTD;ORD REF MC RE SET 7/31
